2604.10079.title: Why Supervised Fine-Tuning Fails to Learn: A Systematic Study of Incomplete Learning in Large Language Models
2604.10079.paper_summary: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) is the standard approach for adapting large language models (LLMs) to downstream tasks. However, we observe a persistent failure mode: even after convergence, models often fail to correctly reproduce a subset of their own supervised training data. We refer to this behavior as the Incomplete Learning Phenomenon(ILP). This paper presents the first systematic study of ILP in LLM fine-tuning. We formalize ILP as post-training failure to internalize supervised instances and demonstrate its prevalence across multiple model families, domains, and datasets. Through controlled analyses, we identify five recurrent sources of incomplete learning: (1) missing prerequisite knowledge in the pre-trained model, (2) conflicts between SFT supervision and pre-training knowledge, (3) internal inconsistencies within SFT data, (4) left-side forgetting during sequential fine-tuning, and (5) insufficient optimization for rare or complex patterns. We introduce a diagnostic-first framework that maps unlearned samples to these causes using observable training and inference signals, and study several targeted mitigation strategies as causal interventions. Experiments on Qwen, LLaMA, and OLMo2 show that incomplete learning is widespread and heterogeneous, and that improvements in aggregate metrics can mask persistent unlearned subsets. The findings highlight the need for fine-grained diagnosis of what supervised fine-tuning fails to learn, and why.
2604.10079.paper_summary_zh: 監督微調（SFT）是將大型語言模型（LLMs）適應於下游任務的標準方法。<lb/>然而，我們觀察到一種持續的失敗模式：即使在收斂後，模型經常無法正確重現其自身監督訓練數據的一部分。<lb/>我們將這種行為稱為不完全學習現象（ILP）。<lb/>本文呈現了對LLM微調中ILP的首次系統研究。<lb/>我們將ILP形式化為在訓練後未能內化監督實例，並展示其在多個模型家族、領域和數據集中的普遍性。<lb/>通過控制分析，我們識別出五個不完全學習的重複來源：（1）預訓練模型中缺失的先決知識，（2）SFT監督與預訓練知識之間的衝突，（3）SFT數據內部的不一致性，（4）在序列微調過程中的左側遺忘，以及（5）對稀有或複雜模式的優化不足。<lb/>我們引入了一個以診斷為先的框架，將未學習的樣本映射到這些原因，使用可觀察的訓練和推斷信號，並研究幾種針對性的緩解策略作為因果干預。<lb/>在Qwen、LLaMA和OLMo2上的實驗顯示，不完全學習是普遍且異質的，並且整體指標的改善可能掩蓋持續存在的未學習子集。<lb/>這些發現凸顯了對監督微調未能學習的內容及其原因進行細緻診斷的必要性。
2604.10079.author: Chao Xue et.al.
2604.10079.authors: Chao Xue, Yao Wang, Mengqiao Liu, Di Liang, Xingsheng Han, Peiyang Liu, Xianjie Wu, Chenyao Lu, Lei Jiang, Yu Lu, Haibo Shi, Shuang Liang, Minlong Peng, Flora D. Salim
